uplink.description: Full 5-in-1 measurement frame: temperature, humidity, CO2, luminosity, motion timer and battery level
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Negative temperature with humidity and luminosity (no CO2 or motion)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Luminosity and motion only, motion timer at 0 seconds (most recent)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder

uplink.description: Declared payload size does not match the actual payload length

errors: Payload size indicated does not match payload size given

uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (same size-check error)

uplink.description: Non-measurement frame type byte (0x02) is rejected rather than mis-parsed as config
uplink._note: wrong leading frame byte; upstream silently routes 0x02 to the config table and mis-decodes, this codec rejects non-0x00 measurement frames
